overall.description: Static shots of two distinct fireplace locations in a fantasy castle setting, likely from a video game. The first scene features a grand hall with a flickering ghostly apparition, while the second shows a cozy sitting room with a snake-carved mantelpiece and tea service.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a cozy, intimate sitting room featuring a brick fireplace with a distinctive snake-carved stone mantel. Two armchairs flank the hearth, and a tea set sits on a table in the foreground, suggesting a comfortable, private space within the castle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from a hauntingly grand castle hall into a cozy, intimate sitting room. It begins with a view of an ornate stone fireplace and a carved wooden surround, where a translucent ghostly figure in white robes flickers in and out of visibility beside the steady flames. As the perspective shifts, the vastness of the hall gives way to a more private atmosphere, moving toward a brick fireplace characterized by a distinctive snake-carved stone mantel. The scene finally settles into a comfortable domestic space, expanding to reveal two flanking armchairs and a tea set resting on a foreground table.
